versions.version_description: Easy version of this song. Enjoy.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Note: At the end of the chorus, hang on the G
chord with these variations
|3x0000|
|3x0002|
|3x0003|

Chords:
[ch]D[/ch] -|xx0230|
[ch]G[/ch] -|3x0030|
[ch]B[/ch] -|x20230|
[ch]A[/ch] -|x00230|

[intro]
[ch]D[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]B[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1: Maddie, Both]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Hey mama, how do you get a red wine stain[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Out of your favorite dress?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Black mascara off a pillowcase?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
Cure a one-too-many headache?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Mama, can I come and maybe stay a few days[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
This weekend or next?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]B[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
And hey, how do you get a red wine stain[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
Out of your favorite dress?[/tab]


[Chorus: Both]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
How does he sleep at night?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
To leave me so easy[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be alright?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna kick myself for falling so hard[/tab]

Mama, can you die from a broken heart?

[ch]D[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 2: Both, Maddie]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Can you ask Daddy if he's got time[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
To come and look at my front door?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
It got slammed last night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
And now it don't close right[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
And just promise that you won't tell him everything[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
And keep that pistol in the drawer[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Mama, please don't say[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
I'm gonna laugh about this someday[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
You didn't see the way he drove away[/tab]


[Chorus: Both]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
How does he sleep at night?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
To leave me so easy[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be alright?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna kick myself for falling so hard[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, can you die from a broken heart?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, a broken heart[/tab]


[Bridge: Maddie, Tae, Both]
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]
Can your knees give out from prayin' so hard? (Prayin' so hard)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]
Can you go blind from crying in the dark? (In the dark)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
Was it ever really real[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
If he don't feel like I feel?[/tab]


[Chorus: Both, Maddie]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]
How does he sleep at night?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
To leave me so easy[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be alright?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
How does he sleep at night?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
To leave me so easy[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be alright?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna kick myself for falling so hard[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, can you die from a broken heart?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
A broken heart[/tab]
